detail: File Switching/analysis/run_switching_canonical_state_audit.m exists locally and is untracked (git status ??).

Repository-level Switching canonical state audit: writes governance CSVs under tables/switching/ and report reports/switching/switching_canonical_state_audit.md; uses createSwitchingRunContext for run-scoped sidecars.
Explicitly governance/audit synthesis; header states no physics fits and no Relaxation inputs; no numerical fitting in script body.
Reads repo via exist() checks on listed relative paths in buildCompletedTests; embedded string inventories in other builders reference docs/tables/scripts paths without fopen content parsing.
Durable: six switching_canonical_state_*.csv files plus switching_canonical_state_audit.md; run directory: execution status copies probe file execution_probe_top.txt.
Outputs follow durable tables + reports/switching markdown + status-style CSV pattern consistent with Switching governance runners.
Primary artifacts are Switching/docs/tables paths; createRunContext requires Aging/utils on path (shared infrastructure not Aging data).
Tables and narrative reference Relaxation comparison blockers and maintenance gauge CSVs as policy documentation; no Relaxation code execution or data read.
No hardcoded drive letters; repoRoot derived from mfilename fullpath.
execution_probe_top.txt writes SCRIPT_ENTERED marker; minor debug-style probe.
catch block writes FAILED execution status then rethrow(ME); not silent.
buildStatusVerdicts and parts of other builders use fixed cell literals; risk of drift from live CSV gate columns without reconciliation policy.
